scripts.build:wasm: RUSTFLAGS='-C link-arg=-z -C link-arg=stack-size=67108864' wasm-pack build ../../crates/yulang-wasm --target web --release --out-dir ../../web/playground/src/wasm
scripts.deploy:dir: npm run build && sh -c 'test -n "$YULANG_PLAYGROUND_DEPLOY_DIR" || { echo "set YULANG_PLAYGROUND_DEPLOY_DIR" >&2; exit 2; }; mkdir -p "$YULANG_PLAYGROUND_DEPLOY_DIR" && rsync -a --delete dist/ "$YULANG_PLAYGROUND_DEPLOY_DIR"'
